transcript:
CALLER: Hi, I want to consult a pulmonologist. I've been coughing for weeks and two antibiotics courses haven't helped.
AGENT: That sounds frustrating. Let's get you an appointment. Your name and number please?
CALLER: Dhruv Chitale. 9867123456.
AGENT: Thank you Dhruv. Dr. Amol Sawant is our pulmonologist. He's available this Thursday and next Monday.
CALLER: Thursday please. Earliest slot?
AGENT: Thursday 9 AM is the first slot. Confirmed for Dhruv Chitale with Dr. Amol Sawant. SMS coming your way. Hope you feel better soon!
CALLER: Thanks. Can I bring previous X-rays?
AGENT: Absolutely, please bring any previous chest X-rays or CT scans and prescriptions. It'll help Dr. Sawant get a full picture.
CALLER: Will do. Thank you.
